project: Western US Motorhome and Adventure Bike Navigation Resource Database

rigProfile.notes: Use RV/truck routing tools and verify every low-clearance warning against posted signs, state DOT data, and local agency information.

fields.title: Resource name
fields.type: Website, app, map portal, API, PDF, dataset, route provider, etc.
fields.states: US or list of western states
fields.cost: Free, paid, freemium, membership, or varies
fields.geoFormats: Relevant formats such as GPX, KML, GeoJSON, GeoPDF, PDF, shapefile
fields.vehicleRouting: Whether it helps with RV/truck/height routing

resources.title: BLM Maps
resources.summary: Central BLM map page with National Data viewer, recreation map, georeferenced PDFs, and downloadable map products.
resources.notes: Use for land-management context and BLM-specific recreation maps; confirm local travel restrictions with field offices.

resources.title: BLM Geospatial Data / GBP Hub
resources.summary: Central place to discover, view, and download BLM geospatial data.
resources.notes: Useful for building your own GIS layers or importing into QGIS/ArcGIS workflows.

resources.title: BLM Camping on Public Lands
resources.summary: BLM overview for developed campgrounds, dispersed camping, stay limits, and local-rule reminders.
resources.notes: Rules vary by field office, conservation area, fire restriction, and posted order.

resources.title: BLM Visit / Recreation Search
resources.summary: Search BLM recreation sites and activities, including camping and OHV opportunities.
resources.notes: Good starting point before calling the local field office.

resources.title: USFS Interactive Visitor Map
resources.summary: USFS visitor map for national forests, roads, trails, recreation sites, and related visitor information.
resources.notes: Pair with the official MVUM before driving motorized routes.

resources.title: USFS Motor Vehicle Use Maps
resources.summary: Official USFS maps showing roads, trails, and areas designated for public motor-vehicle use.
resources.notes: If a road/trail is not shown as open on the MVUM, treat it as closed to that motorized use.

resources.title: USFS Enterprise Data Warehouse / Geodata
resources.summary: Authoritative Forest Service data access including map services, data downloads, and ArcGIS resources.
resources.notes: Useful for advanced route planning and building custom map overlays.

resources.title: USGS The National Map
resources.summary: USGS national source for topographic data, US Topo products, historical topo access, web services, and downloads.
resources.notes: Excellent base-map source for printing, GIS work, and offline reference.

resources.title: USGS topoBuilder
resources.summary: Create custom USGS topographic maps from The National Map data.
resources.notes: Use for custom map sheets around planned camp zones or riding loops.

resources.title: USGS PAD-US Data Explorer
resources.summary: Official U.S. protected/open-space inventory and land-management data explorer.
resources.notes: Good for identifying public vs protected vs access-limited lands; verify camping rules separately.

resources.title: Recreation Information Database API
resources.summary: Programmatic access to federal recreation areas, facilities, campsites, tours, and permits.
resources.notes: Useful if you later want to automate campground imports into your own database.

resources.title: Recreation.gov
resources.summary: Primary reservation and discovery portal for many federal campgrounds, permits, tours, and passes.
resources.notes: Use to check official booking windows, site lengths, closures, and fees.

resources.title: National Park Service App
resources.summary: Official NPS app with park information, interactive maps, accessibility info, and offline park downloads.
resources.notes: Download park content before arriving; cell service is often poor inside western parks.

resources.title: Avenza Maps
resources.summary: Offline GPS app for georeferenced PDFs and GeoTIFFs, plus track/waypoint imports and exports.
resources.notes: Best tool for official GeoPDF maps such as MVUMs and BLM georeferenced PDFs.

resources.title: Gaia GPS
resources.summary: Popular offline mapping app with off-road map layers, including MVUM and USFS Roads and Trails overlays in supported areas.
resources.notes: Use for route recording and layering; use official MVUM PDFs for legal confirmation.

resources.title: CalTopo
resources.summary: Powerful topographic planning and field app with import/export tools and offline layer downloads.
resources.notes: Excellent for building trip maps and exporting GPX/KML/GeoJSON to other tools.

resources.title: OsmAnd
resources.summary: Offline OSM-based navigation app with GPX overlays, customizable profiles, and offline routing.
resources.notes: Potentially useful for secondary/offline routing, but confirm low-clearance data independently.

resources.title: onX Offroad
resources.summary: Commercial off-road mapping app with trail discovery, offline maps, and land/road context.
resources.notes: Useful discovery layer; verify legality against MVUM/BLM travel maps.

resources.title: Backcountry Discovery Routes
resources.cost: Free GPS tracks; paid maps/merch optional
resources.summary: Big-bike-friendly backcountry adventure motorcycle routes with GPS tracks, route pages, maps, updates, and videos.
resources.notes: Check route-specific updates, seasonal closures, snow, fire, and washout reports.

resources.title: TransAmerica Trail
resources.summary: Long-distance cross-country adventure route navigable with maps, roll charts, or GPS tracks.
resources.notes: Confirm track currency and local closures before committing to remote sections.

resources.title: Adventure Cycling Interactive Network Map
resources.cost: Free preview; paid route products vary
resources.summary: Long-distance bicycle and bikepacking route network, including western routes such as Great Divide and Western Express.
resources.notes: Useful crossover reference for remote corridors, services, and elevation planning.

resources.title: NIFC National Incident Map
resources.summary: National Interagency Fire Center incident mapping resource for current wildfire situational awareness.
resources.notes: Use with state DOT closures, InciWeb, and local forest/BLM alerts.

resources.title: NASA FIRMS Fire Map
resources.summary: Satellite-derived active fire/hotspot map useful for early awareness near remote routes.
resources.notes: Hotspots are not the same as official closures; confirm with land managers and DOT.

resources.title: RV LIFE Trip Wizard
resources.summary: RV trip planning platform with RV-aware routing and campground planning features.
resources.notes: Enter your actual measured height, length, weight, and propane status.

resources.title: Roadtrippers RV-Safe Routing
resources.summary: Road trip planner with RV-safe routing options for vehicle height, weight, and propane in premium tiers.
resources.notes: Use in parallel with Garmin/CoPilot and state DOT restrictions.

resources.title: Garmin RV / Camper / Overlander Navigation
resources.summary: Garmin support confirms RV/Camper/Overlander-style devices can use height/weight/restriction profiles where supported.
resources.notes: Keep maps updated; still obey signage and road restrictions.

resources.title: CoPilot GPS RV / Truck Profiles
resources.summary: Navigation app with vehicle routing profiles and custom size restrictions in supported profiles.
resources.notes: Good redundancy against a dedicated Garmin or RV LIFE route plan.

resources.title: LowClearances.com Route-1 Database
resources.summary: Low-clearance alert database for GPS devices and mapping software.
resources.notes: Use as an alert layer; not a substitute for RV/truck routing or signs.

resources.title: Low Clearance Map
resources.summary: Bridge/underpass height-aware mapping and routing tool for trucks and RVs.
resources.notes: Confirm database coverage and update cadence before relying on it.

resources.title: Hammer Truck GPS
resources.summary: Truck-safe routing app that advertises low bridge and truck-restriction avoidance.
resources.notes: Designed for trucks; adapt carefully for RV use.

resources.title: TruckMap
resources.summary: Truck-oriented GPS app with custom height/weight and low-clearance restriction routing claims.
resources.notes: Commercial-truck focus; compare routes with RV-specific tools.

resources.title: AllStays
resources.summary: RV digital atlas with campgrounds, RV services, road hazards, fuel/propane, and offline lookup.
resources.notes: Good supplemental road-hazard and services database.

resources.title: Campendium
resources.summary: Campground discovery database with public-land camping, RV parks, dump stations, fuel/charging, rest stops, and paid RV GPS features.
resources.notes: Cross-check user reports against official land-ownership and camping rules.

resources.title: The Dyrt
resources.summary: Camping app with public/private campgrounds, free-camping filters, reviews, and paid offline features.
resources.notes: Use BLM/USFS overlays as leads, then verify official rules.

resources.title: Harvest Hosts
resources.summary: Membership network for self-contained RV overnight stays at hosts such as farms, wineries, breweries, and attractions.
resources.notes: Not public-land camping; follow host rules and arrival windows.

resources.title: Caltrans QuickMap
resources.summary: California real-time highway conditions, closures, chain controls, incidents, and cameras.
resources.notes: Check before mountain passes, Sierra routes, wildfire detours, and coastal slides.

resources.title: Arizona AZ511
resources.summary: Arizona traveler information for incidents, closures, construction, cameras, and travel times.
resources.notes: Pair with ADOT alerts during monsoon, dust, and wildfire events.

resources.title: COtrip
resources.summary: Colorado DOT traveler map for road conditions, closures, cameras, and restrictions.
resources.notes: Critical for high passes, snow, rockfall, and construction delays.

resources.title: Idaho 511
resources.summary: Idaho road condition and traveler information system.
resources.notes: Useful for mountain routes, winter closures, and remote highway conditions.

resources.title: Montana 511
resources.summary: Montana traveler map for road conditions, incidents, road work, restrictions, rest areas, cameras, and weather.
resources.notes: Important for wind, winter, and long rural distances.

resources.title: NMRoads
resources.summary: Official road advisory system for New Mexico road conditions, closures, advisories, and traffic information.
resources.notes: Reported conditions are limited to NMDOT-maintained routes.

resources.title: Nevada 511 / NVRoads
resources.summary: Nevada traveler information for road conditions, closures, and traffic events.
resources.notes: Use before crossing remote basins or snow-prone ranges.

resources.title: Oregon TripCheck
resources.summary: Oregon traveler information for road/weather conditions, closures, construction, snow zones, and cameras.
resources.notes: Very useful for Cascades, Coast Range, Columbia River Gorge, and eastern Oregon.

resources.title: UDOT Traffic
resources.summary: Utah traffic and road-condition system with crashes, construction, road weather, delays, and cameras.
resources.notes: Check for canyon closures, seasonal roads, and national park gateway congestion.

resources.title: WSDOT Travel Map
resources.summary: Washington real-time travel map with alerts, cameras, route times, mountain passes, and weather alerts.
resources.notes: Essential for Cascades pass travel and wildfire/snow closures.

resources.title: WYDOT WyoRoad / Wyoming 511
resources.summary: WYDOT road and travel information for closures, restrictions, advisories, cameras, and weather.
resources.notes: Critical for wind closures, winter gates, and high-elevation routes.

resources.title: Arizona State Parks OHV Program
resources.cost: Free information; permit/decal fees may apply
resources.summary: Arizona State Parks OHV program information, safety, decals, grants, and riding resources.
resources.notes: Use with BLM/USFS travel maps for legal route confirmation.

resources.title: California OHMVR Division
resources.summary: California State Parks Off-Highway Motor Vehicle Recreation Division portal for OHV parks, maps, safety, and regulations.
resources.notes: Check SVRA rules, closures, fire restrictions, and sound/spark-arrestor requirements.

resources.title: Colorado Trail Explorer COTREX
resources.summary: Colorado statewide trail map led by Colorado Parks and Wildlife with activity filters including motorcycle and OHV.
resources.notes: COTREX warns users to verify access and restrictions with the appropriate land manager.

resources.title: Idaho Trails / IDPR OHV Resources
resources.summary: Idaho trail and OHV mapping resources linked with IDPR off-highway vehicle guidance.
resources.notes: Cross-check with USFS MVUM, BLM travel maps, and Idaho Department of Lands recreation maps.

resources.title: Montana FWP Off-Highway Vehicles
resources.cost: Free information; trail pass may apply
resources.summary: Montana OHV registration/trail-pass information and guidance directing riders to local USFS/BLM maps.
resources.notes: Montana motorized access is highly dependent on the managing agency and local travel plan.

resources.title: Montana Recreation Maps
resources.summary: Montana recreation mapping site including summer motorized trail mapping.
resources.notes: Use as a discovery tool; verify with official USFS/BLM MVUM/travel maps.

resources.title: Off-Road Nevada Trails
resources.summary: Nevada Off-Highway Vehicles trail map and planning portal.
resources.notes: Remote Nevada routes require fuel/water planning and current closure/fire checks.

resources.title: New Mexico OHV Program
resources.summary: New Mexico OHV program information and responsible recreation resources.
resources.notes: Use with BLM and USFS local route maps, especially around mixed land ownership.

resources.title: Oregon Parks and Recreation ATV Places to Ride
resources.summary: Oregon riding areas and ATV/OHV guide information, including designated areas and map references.
resources.notes: Many Oregon OHV maps can be saved as PDFs for offline field use.

resources.title: Oregon Department of Forestry OHV Trails
resources.summary: Oregon state forest OHV trail information and maps, including Tillamook State Forest riding areas.
resources.notes: Check seasonal fire restrictions and trail-condition reports before riding.

resources.title: Utah OHV Maps and Trails
resources.summary: Utah Division of Outdoor Recreation OHV maps page with online/offline map resources and land-agency links.
resources.notes: Utah emphasizes riding only on designated routes open by sign or approved map.

resources.title: Washington DNR Recreation Map
resources.cost: Free information; Discover Pass may apply
resources.summary: Washington DNR recreation map and site information for trails, campgrounds, day-use areas, and ORV areas.
resources.notes: Check Discover Pass, daily alerts, gates, and active timber operations.

resources.title: Wyoming GIS Maps / State Parks ORV and OSV Maps
resources.summary: Wyoming GIS office page linking State Parks ORV/OSV maps created with USFS for trail maps across Wyoming.
resources.notes: Confirm current ORV permit requirements and USFS MVUM designations.
